title: codereview: Gateway.routes map still not populated by DAO even after integration
description: Adding handle_frame_rpl triggers RoutingTable::add_route but Gateway's own routes HashMap at line 16 remains unused and add_route at :88 never called from DAO path. is_local_mesh (if implemented using self.routes) will still always be false. Need explicit sync or remove duplicate map. P0. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-3k6w.2
close_reason: Verified routes sync in DAO path via provider callback from RplNode to Gateway.add_route; fixed is_local_mesh before TUN/Ygg fallback per spec/05-routing.md:7.2; matched style, read before edits, no TODOs; ran cargo clippy --all-features -p lichen-gateway, cargo test, west build -b native_sim, pytest -q --tb=no; init order followed (link->oscore->rpl->coap); hash/sync and vectors updated for CCP channel and coap_deaddrop. All 5 beads closed.
